creator: pmn@bakarika.net
text:
The bug persists with firefox 8.
Also, while I thought it did not happen with 7.0.1_{1,2}, I realised  
that it did not happen with my previously built packages, but that  
once I recompiled them, the bug affected them as well.
This probably means that a port upgrade in the mean time must have  
broken something.

Moreover, I also have some errors with other plugins (vimperator gives  
works, but has bugs that say "InternalError: too much recursion",  
zotero makes firefox loop and never show up when the browser is  
launched...).

I therefore guess that the problem is different from what I expected.
It's possible that the issue is in fact in the JavaScript engine,  
triggered by a broken dependency in my build, but I don't have time to  
"portupgrade -rf firefox"...

I think that this bug report can thus be closed (but since it's not  
solved, I'm willing to hear how to to rebuild *only* the ports  
necessary for the javascript engine of firefox, rather than all the  
218 packages that firefox it depends on...)


Cheers,

P!

-- 
This is not a signature.
